data.title: U.S. Stock Markets Close Lower on January 13
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 398.21 points, or 0.8%, closing at 49,191.99 points on January 13. The S&P 500 Index decreased by 13.56 points, or 0.19%, ending at 6,963.71 points. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq Composite Index dropped by 24.03 points, or 0.1%, to close at 23,709.87 points.

data.title: JPMorgan Q4 profit misses Street estimates as Apple Card costs bite
data.description:
JPMorgan posted its fourth-quarter results today after the bell and said profit fell 7% in the fourth quarter of 2025, landing at $13 billion, or $4. 63 per share, missing FactSet estimates of $4. 85 per share. As of press time, the JPM stock has crashed by 4. 15%. Meanwhile, JPMorgan’s quarterly revenue rose 7% to $45. 8 billion, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-q4-profit-misses-street-estimates/

data.title: Significant WBTC Transfer Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 04:50, a total of 264.87 WBTC was transferred from one anonymous address, starting with 0x8C08, to another anonymous address, beginning with 0xd78e.

data.title: Mysterious Gen Z drug kingpin gets 20 years in prison for laundering millions in crypto
data.description:
A Gen Z drug trafficker has been sentenced to 20 years in prison after authorities found that he used crypto as a money laundering and payment tool in a narcotics distribution network worth $4 million. The kingpin was sentenced at the Ulsan District Court, where prosecutors accused the kingpin and his gang of smuggling drugs […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mysterious-gen-z-drug-kingpin-gets-20-years-in-prison-for-laundering-millions-in-crypto/

data.title: CZ tweeted in support of Siyuan: Donating money does not equate to being able to "command" the other party; burning BNB benefits token holders.
data.description: Regarding the previous decision by Happy-Sci creator Siyuan to destroy all donations, CZ (@cz_binance) posted on X that he "agrees with and supports Siyuan's approach." In his tweet, CZ stated that donating to others does not mean the recipient is obligated to act according to the donor's wishes; he also noted that Siyuan clearly did not want any association with the related memes; and that redirecting "donations" to YZiLabs or platform employees would increase the company's processing difficulties. Regarding the BNB destruction, CZ stated that it was not a waste, mentioning that BNB Chain recently destroys over $1 billion worth of BNB every quarter, resulting in a deflationary total supply and benefiting BNB holders; as a BNB holder, he thanked anyone who destroyed their BNB.
